verses.1: The wilderness and the dry land will be glad.
verses.4: Tell those who have a fearful heart, “Be strong!
verses.5: Then the eyes of the blind will be opened,
verses.6: Then the lame man will leap like a deer,
verses.7: The burning sand will become a pool,
verses.8: A highway will be there, a road,
verses.10: Then the LORD’s ransomed ones will return,
